opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building agents with OS integration introduces harder constraints than web-based tooling—you need strict sandboxing for security while maintaining low-latency access to system calls for real utility. The real challenge is context management; agents often exceed token limits when tracking multi-step system operations, requiring careful state serialization between calls.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider LLM routing systems and agent tooling that interact directly with OS-level resources, giving me practical experience with the core challenges discussed here.
